violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Owner/operator has a recently expired Food Safety Manager (FMC) certificate through RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided to renew. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door prep unit were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The floor in the warewashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the front section of the walk-in freezer do not have proper coving. The coving has peeled away from the front of the walk-in. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
